title: Upload additional documents
leadParagraph: You can upload a document to support an application, or to show proof that you have done something.
paragraphShare: We usually share anything you upload with the other party, for example your landlord, housing association or mortgage provider.
paragraphWithoutNotice: If your application is ‘without notice’ (where you have asked us to consider your application without telling the other party) we will not share anything with them.
exampleBullet1: evidence that a judge has asked for, like bank statements showing your rent payments
exampleBullet2: photographs of the property in a state of disrepair, like damp in the bathroom
exampleBullet3: a report from an electrician or a plumber, showing evidence of a repair that needs to be done
exampleBullet4: emails or letters from the claimant (your landlord, housing association, or mortgage lender)
fileTypesIntro: You can upload the following file types:
restrictions: You cannot upload video or audio files.
